text:
indicates if the beneficiary was enrolled in an employer-sponsored prescription drug plan 
that qualified for Part D’s retiree drug subsidy (RDS) for a given month (January through December). 

LONG NAME: RDS_IND_01 
RDS_IND_02 
RDS_IND_03

RDS_IND_12 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Y = Employer subsidized for the retired beneficiary 
N = No
